metadata.description: Shopify development standards — skills, commands, and agents for theme, app, and performance development

plugins.name: shopify-theme-standards
plugins.description: Liquid, CSS, JS, schema, and section standards for Shopify themes

plugins.name: shopify-app-standards

plugins.description: PageSpeed Insights auditing, performance optimization, and client reporting for Shopify themes

plugins.name: skill-toolkit
plugins.description: Create and validate Claude Code skills. Includes an interactive skill creator and a multi-phase skill validator with mechanical checks and LLM-powered quality analysis
